stories.title: Fix CreditMigrationModal stale useState for new orgs
acceptance: CreditMigrationModal does NOT show for orgs created after 2026-02-01
useState(open) replaced with derived state that re-evaluates when activeOrg loads
Modal still shows correctly for pre-existing orgs that need migration
Typecheck passes
stories.rootCause: useState(open) captures isNewOrg on first render when activeOrg is null (defaults false). useState never re-evaluates — new orgs see migration modal they shouldn't.
stories.fix: Replace useState(computedOpen) with useMemo or direct derivation that re-evaluates when orgStore.activeOrg changes. Guard: if !activeOrg, don't show modal.

stories.title: Fix UsageChart PostgREST .not() dropping NULL metadata rows
acceptance: Usage query includes rows where metadata IS NULL
Filter uses .or('metadata->>source.neq.onboarding,metadata.is.null')
Usage chart shows accurate totals matching actual credit consumption
Typecheck passes
stories.rootCause: PostgREST .not('col','eq','val') translates to col != val which excludes NULLs. Most cost_tracking rows have null metadata, so usage is severely understated.

stories.title: Fix LowBalanceBanner showing green banner with 0 credits + transient flash
acceptance: Green '10 Free AI credits' banner only shows when balance > 0
costEventsLoading added to early-return guard to prevent red banner flash
No banner flicker on page load
Typecheck passes
stories.rootCause: Two issues: (1) Removed balance > 0 guard means green banner shows if credit grant failed. (2) Missing costEventsLoading in early-return causes transient red banner flash.
stories.fix: Re-add balance > 0 guard for green banner. Add costEventsLoading to early-return conditions.

stories.title: Fix meetingbaas-webhook pipeline firing before transcript written
acceptance: Pipeline only fires AFTER transcript_text is written to meeting record
Pipeline checks for transcript_text existence before proceeding
Existing meetings with transcripts still process correctly
Pin @supabase/supabase-js@2.43.4 (fix unpinned @2)
Replace legacy corsHeaders with getCorsHeaders(req)
stories.rootCause: Fire-and-forget: webhook triggers pipeline immediately after starting process-recording, before transcript_text is written. Pipeline silently skips all steps because transcript is null.
stories.fix: Await process-recording completion before triggering pipeline, OR add transcript null-check with retry. Also fix unpinned supabase-js and legacy CORS.

stories.title: Fix reprocess-meetings-ai double basic analysis with force=true
acceptance: With force=true, analyzeTranscriptWithClaude runs exactly once
Pipeline skips basic_analysis when already run directly
Credits charged only once for basic analysis
orgId passed to analyzeTranscriptWithClaude for cost tracking
stories.rootCause: force=true causes analyzeTranscriptWithClaude to run directly, then pipeline runs it again as first step. Double execution, double credits. Also orgId not passed to direct call.
stories.fix: Mark basic_analysis as completed before pipeline runs when force=true. Pass orgId to direct analyzeTranscriptWithClaude call.

stories.title: Fix AgentConfigConfirmStep tooltip on <option> + wrong agent_type fallback
acceptance: Sales methodology tooltips display correctly (not on <option> elements)
Replace <select> with Radix Select or RadioGroup for tooltip support
buildClientSideFallback() uses 'crm_update' for key_competitors (not 'research')
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
stories.rootCause: Two issues: (1) TooltipTrigger asChild on <option> — browsers ignore events on <option>, tooltips never show. (2) buildClientSideFallback() uses wrong agent_type for key_competitors.
stories.fix: Replace <select> with Radix Select/RadioGroup for tooltip support. Fix agent_type from 'research' to 'crm_update' for key_competitors.

parallelGroups.reason: No file overlap — three independent credit UI fixes
No file overlap — two independent backend edge function fixes
